name: chriscox--docs-sync
description: Keep project documentation in sync with code changes. Identifies which docs need updating after a PR merges or code changes, drafts the updates, and manages doc site structure (mkdocs, docusaurus, vitepress). Use when: (1) a PR just merged and docs may need updating, (2) the user says "update the docs" or "sync docs", (3) a new doc was created and needs to be added to site navigation, (4) the user wants to audit which docs are stale. NOT for: writing docs from scratch for a new project (just write them), generating API reference docs from code comments (use typedoc/jazzy/etc.), or content that isn't developer documentation.
